title: Cyber Strategy and Roadmap Advisory Pack

intake_questions.text: Does the organisation have a documented cybersecurity strategy or roadmap?
Is cybersecurity aligned to the broader business strategy and investment planning?
Has the board received a cybersecurity briefing in the last 12 months?
What is the target cybersecurity maturity level the organisation is working towards?
Is there a multi-year cybersecurity investment plan with budget allocation?

scope_template.prompt: Identify business units whose strategic priorities must be reflected in the cyber strategy
List strategic business assets and digital transformation initiatives that inform security priorities
Confirm any strategic domains or initiatives excluded from this advisory engagement

requirements.text: A documented cybersecurity strategy aligned to business objectives must exist with defined outcomes, timeframes, and executive ownership.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Cybersecurity strategy document; business objective alignment matrix; executive ownership assignment; board endorsement

requirements.text: A baseline maturity assessment against a recognised framework (NIST CSF, CMMI, or equivalent) must underpin the strategy with target states and gap analysis.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Maturity assessment report; baseline vs target scores by domain; gap analysis; prioritised remediation roadmap

requirements.text: A multi-year cybersecurity investment plan with budget allocation by capability domain must be linked to strategic objectives and risk reduction outcomes.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Cybersecurity investment plan; budget allocation by domain; ROI/risk-reduction mapping; approval records

requirements.text: Cybersecurity governance structures must provide board-level visibility, strategic decision-making authority, and accountability for strategy execution.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Board cybersecurity briefing materials; governance committee minutes; CISO reporting structure; KPI/KRI dashboard

requirements.text: A phased security roadmap with milestones, owners, and measurable success criteria must be maintained and reviewed at least annually.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Security roadmap with phases and milestones; owner assignments; progress review records; roadmap update history

evidence_requests.title: Cybersecurity Strategy Document
evidence_requests.description: Current cybersecurity strategy with business objective alignment, executive ownership, and board endorsement

evidence_requests.title: Maturity Assessment Report
evidence_requests.description: Baseline maturity assessment against NIST CSF or equivalent; target state definition; gap analysis

evidence_requests.title: Cybersecurity Investment Plan
evidence_requests.description: Multi-year investment plan with budget allocation by domain and risk-reduction outcome mapping

evidence_requests.title: Board Cybersecurity Reporting Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Recent board/committee briefing materials and minutes showing cybersecurity strategic oversight

evidence_requests.title: Security Roadmap with Progress Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Current roadmap with milestones, owners, and most recent progress review results

task_templates.title: Review cybersecurity strategy alignment to business objectives
Assess maturity baseline methodology and current scores
Evaluate cybersecurity investment plan for completeness and linkage to risk
Review board governance structures and reporting quality
Assess roadmap feasibility, prioritisation, and progress tracking
Interview CISO and board sponsor on strategy direction and constraints
Benchmark maturity and investment against sector peers

finding_templates.title_pattern: Maturity baseline not established for domain: {domain}

severity_model.critical: No cybersecurity strategy; board unaware of cyber risk; investment entirely reactive
severity_model.high: Strategy exists but not board-endorsed or not linked to business objectives; major gaps
severity_model.medium: Strategy present but outdated or roadmap stalled; investment plan not maintained
severity_model.low: Minor strategy improvement; roadmap needs refresh or metric quality to improve
severity_model.informational: Best-practice enhancement for strategy maturity and board engagement

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Cyber Strategy Design Workshop
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Facilitate board and CISO workshop to define 3-year cybersecurity outcomes aligned to business strategy

advisory_clinic_templates.title: NIST CSF Maturity Scoring Session
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Walk through NIST CSF 2.0 domains; score baseline and target; produce heat map for roadmap prioritisation

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Board Cyber Briefing Preparation
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Develop board-level cyber risk briefing materials; present in language of business risk and regulatory obligation
